title: Youmind 18739 Q 3D
prompt: Create a highly detailed, whimsical scene featuring a charming 3D chibi doll inspired by the woman in the reference image. The chibi character has expressive oversized eyes, soft rounded facial features, {argument name="skin tone" default="warm brown"} skin tone, and a playful, slightly mischievous personality. She wears miniature {argument name="attire" default="traditional Indian attire"} inspired by the reference—gold embroidered outfit, delicate jewelry, including a tiny maang tikka, earrings, and a small bindi.The chibi doll is sitting delicately atop a realistic human finger, maintaining perfect balance. She is casually sipping an {argument name="drink" default="iced latte"} through a straw, while holding a transparent cup of milk tea in her other hand. Both drinks show visible ice cubes, soft reflections, and subtle condensation droplets for realism. The hand is ultra-realistic with smooth natural skin texture, soft lighting, and sharply detailed glossy nail art.The fingers are slightly curved, positioned naturally as if presenting the tiny character. Environment: A modern office desk setting with realistic elements—keyboard, mouse, and computer monitor. The background features a shallow depth of field with blurred coworkers and office details, creating a natural cinematic bokeh effect. Lighting & Style: Soft, balanced, slightly warm lighting that enhances both realism and charm. Gentle shadows, realistic reflections, and cinematic depth of field Art Style: Hyper-realistic + stylized 3D chibi fusion, अत्यंत detailed, high resolution (8K), cinematic composition, vibrant yet natural colors, soft shadows, global illumination, ultra-sharp focus on subject.
